protocol.name: CSPR-12 frozen pre-2024 selection evaluation
protocol.entry: next 5m open after completed Spot and USD-M bars
protocol.exit: scheduled open 12 completed 5m bars after entry
protocol.strict_mdd: held path, favorable extreme first then adverse; exit-bar high/low excluded
protocol.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle cash

control_actions.direction_flip: negative primary side on exact primary clock
control_actions.signal_delay_1bar: primary side and signal shifted one 5m bar
control_actions.no_centroid: Spot taker-flow side on no-centroid clock
control_actions.no_perp_event_confirmation: Spot taker-flow side without USD-M event-count confirmation
control_actions.spot_only: Spot taker-flow side using Spot-only quarantine
control_actions.perp_only: USD-M price-return side using USD-M-only quarantine
control_actions.role_swap: USD-M price-return side on role-swapped clock
control_actions.spot_lag_1h: Spot taker-flow side stale by 12 bars
control_actions.spot_lag_24h: Spot taker-flow side stale by 288 bars

failures: primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat direction_flip
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat signal_delay_1bar
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_centroid
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_perp_event_confirmation
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat spot_only
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat perp_only
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat role_swap
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat spot_lag_1h
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat spot_lag_24h

selection.reason: CSPR-12 failed at least one frozen pre-2024 gate
